name: codex-starter-kit
description: Guided creation, lifecycle status, and truthful verification for Codex Starter Kit repositories

interface.shortDescription: Create, inspect, and verify Starter Kit repositories.
interface.longDescription: A skills-only adapter for approved create and verification plans plus read-only status while preserving the standalone Starter Kit engine's authority, evidence states, and fail-closed compatibility boundary.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me create, inspect, or verify a Codex Starter Kit managed repository.
